lede: A look at April 15 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Shanti Dope and Albert Riera, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2021 Indianapolis FedEx shooting
events.desc: A mass shooting occurs at a FedEx Ground facility in Indianapolis, Indiana, killing nine and injuring seven.

events.title: Air China Flight 129
events.desc: Air China Flight 129 crashes on approach to Gimhae International Airport in Busan, South Korea, killing 129 people.

events.title: Hillsborough disaster
events.desc: Hillsborough disaster: A human crush occurs at Hillsborough Stadium, home of Sheffield Wednesday, in the FA Cup Semi-final, resulting in the deaths of 97 Liverpool fans.

events.title: Boeing B-52 Stratofortress
events.desc: First flight of the Boeing B-52 Stratofortress.

events.title: Jackie Robinson
events.desc: Jackie Robinson debuts for the Brooklyn Dodgers, breaking baseball's color line.

events.title: 1936–1939 Arab revolt in Palestine
events.desc: First day of the Arab revolt in Mandatory Palestine.

events.title: Japanese mission school fire
events.desc: Racially motivated Nihon Shōgakkō fire lit by a serial arsonist kills 10 children in Sacramento, California.

events.title: John B. Kendrick
events.desc: U.S. Senator John B. Kendrick of Wyoming introduces a resolution calling for an investigation of a secret land deal, which leads to the discovery of the Teapot Dome scandal.

events.title: Titanic
events.desc: The British passenger liner RMS Titanic sinks in the North Atlantic at 2:20 a.m., two hours and forty minutes after hitting an iceberg. Only 710 of 2,224 passengers and crew on board survive.

events.title: Serse
events.desc: Serse, an Italian opera by George Frideric Handel, receives its premiere performance in London, England.

births.name: Veronica Linklater, Baroness Linklater of Butterstone

deaths.text: John Tuzo Wilson, Canadian geophysicist and geologist
Edward Smith (sea captain), British merchant navy officer

observances.text: Christian feast day: Abbo II of Metz
Christian feast day: Blessed César de Bus
Christian feast day: Father Damien (Catholic and Episcopal Church)
